strings.quote_verify_fail: I couldn't verify your quote. Let me connect you with support.
strings.quote_saved_reminder: No problem. Your quote is saved and valid for 24 hours. You can return anytime to complete your booking.
strings.confirm_pay_prompt: Please confirm — would you like to proceed to payment? (yes/no)
strings.payment_pending: Still waiting for your payment. Take your time — I'm here when you're ready.
strings.booking_success: Payment confirmed! Your booking is all set.
strings.payment_failed_msg: It looks like the payment didn't go through.
strings.quote_still_valid: No problem. Your quote is still valid — you can return within 24 hours to try again.
strings.quote_expired_msg: Unfortunately, your quote has expired. Prices are based on real-time availability and may have changed. Would you like me to run a fresh search?
strings.quote_expired_bye: No problem. Feel free to come back anytime!
